blocks.content: Gardrock found the desired location not far away.
The canyon had sunk, creating a fissure.
It was a narrow gap, just wide enough for one person to pass through, and a single beam of light was shining through it.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Look here.
Gardrock pointed to the center of the beam of light.
Only there was the light clustered together.
It looked fluffy like snowflakes, but upon closer inspection, you could see particles of light swirling around.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How could he explain this?
Naturally, light particles clumping together like this was impossible.
The Nor didn't think differently either.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Do you see how the light gathers here?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, but how is this possible?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: This place is imbued with the essence of light.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, this essence is gathering the light?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: No, it's the light that stayed for so long that the essence settled.
Essence can inhabit anything—wind, water, even thoughts—as long as those thoughts remain unchanged for a very long time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: When a certain quality accumulates over a long period, the essence of that quality materializes.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: When essence accumulates for a long time, it becomes a spirit.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A spirit is essentially an active form of essence.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Moreover, humans can make contracts with spirits.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you contract with a light spirit, you can draw on the power of light anytime, anywhere.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: But finding one is like plucking a star from the sky.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, this light will become a spirit eventually?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Haha, yes, maybe in a thousand years, as long as it doesn't dissipate in the meantime.
A thousand years was far longer than the time given to humans.
The period for an essence to become a spirit would be similar.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, we can use this place to reach Nor's Haven.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Gather here, everyone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The space is tight. Shouldn't some of us move to the other side?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: It's fine.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: By the way, the magic of the land of the earth doesn't have a wide range.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: With the essence of light, we can expand the scale as much as we want.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Like this.
Gardrock grasped the cluster of light.
His fist glowed golden, and the light spread up his arm to his shoulder.
Soon, it seemed the light would cover his entire body.
Nature's power was limitless, so humans borrowing that power could expand their scale indefinitely.
However, it took quite a bit of time.
Even after a while, the light didn't go past his shoulder, and a look of doubt crossed Gardrock's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Strange. Why is it taking so long? It usually takes about five minutes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Master, could it be that the essence of light has weakened?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Impossible. It worked fine three days ago.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: For the essence's energy to change, it would take at least hundreds of years.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Or something could be weakening the essence's energy.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: But that can't be.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: This place only has one law.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: That's why we use it as an intermediate base.
From Clove's words, Gardrock realized.
It might be a delusion, but looking for other factors while ignoring the only correct answer was an even bigger delusion.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Could it be...? But why?
The essence of light began to waver.
The ground, and finally the entire canyon, shook as if an earthquake was happening.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: What's wrong? What's the problem?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Get out of here quickly! It's the Vortex Serpent! The essence is destabilizing!
If the cliff collapsed, they'd be crushed, so Shirone's group hurried out of the canyon fissure.
Looking from outside, the entire area was shaking.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn! Where is it? Where's it coming from?
Rian drew his greatsword and stood in front of Shirone.
The mages formed a formation and prepared for battle.
Tess focused her senses, searching the surroundings.
The tremors on the left and right were different.
The creature was rounding the corner on the right.
The ground shook so much that it was hard to stand.
Tess realized something was wrong.
Her senses and reality didn't match.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: There! Over there!
Shirone pointed in surprise.
A tiny, white creature, no larger than three meters, was crouched on a rock on all fours.
But could this really be called a creature?
It had no eyes, nose, or mouth.
It resembled a salamander, but its surface was smooth like polished jade.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is that? Is that the Vortex Serpent?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: It's not that one!
At Gardrock's shout, Shirone instinctively stepped back.
As his view opened, he finally saw it.
A shadow of the Vortex Serpent was cast over the canyon.
Unbelievably, it was a shadow large enough to fill the entire cliff.
Shirone turned his gaze back to the rock.
The salamander-like creature was glowing intensely.
The light from its body was casting the shadow.
By the time Shirone realized this, the shadow had already split its massive jaws and was lunging at them.
A curtain of darkness blocked their view.
The sheer size defied common sense, making it hard to believe they were under attack.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Danger!
Shirone's Photon Cannon exploded.
The moment the light spread, they realized how close the sharp shadow claws had come.
Just a bit later, and they would have been torn apart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Kiiaaaah!
The Vortex Serpent screamed as the Photon Cannon ripped through it.
It was likely similar to the mechanism of the Harvester.
A creature without a mouth couldn't possibly have a sound organ.
When they regained their senses, they saw the shadow of the Vortex Serpent retreating like storm clouds.
It was fortunate they blocked the first attack.
Most prey lost their lives to the Vortex Serpent's first strike.
Trapped in darkness, they couldn't even see the attack coming.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What is that? Is it a creature or not? Is that salamander controlling it?

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: No, the true form of the Vortex Serpent is the shadow.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: There is no main body.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: The thing on the rock is just an 'avatar' created by the Vortex Serpent's shadow.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: How can that be? There must be a body for there to be a shadow!

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: I don't know.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: We call this a 'reversal of law.'

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: That's an outsider.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: I don't know where it came from, but it's definitely not from any world we can imagine.
The Vortex Serpent hesitated to approach.
Among the humans it had killed, none had emitted light before, so it was naturally cautious.
As the avatar's body glowed, the shadow grew larger.
It was similar to a wild beast displaying itself before its enemy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's like a wild animal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It probably wasn't a common predator in its original world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Maybe like a cat or a mouse.

blocks.speaker: Kanya
blocks.content: A cat? A mouse? Are you joking?

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: It really existed, a world where darkness rules over light.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Reversal of law. What was written on Arcane's note was true.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone is right.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If it's a world where rules are reversed, all creatures would exist as shadows.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Vortex Serpent wouldn't be particularly strong.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Of course, things are different here.
Gardrock examined the canyon fissure.
As expected, the Vortex Serpent's law had weakened the essence of light.
Escape was impossible in this state.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Hey, we've passed the crisis, but stay alert.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: Its weakness is light.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: That's why it doesn't act during the day.

blocks.speaker: Gardrock
blocks.content: I don't know why the law is broken, but using light magic gives us a chance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone recalled his battle with the Harvester.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: From that fight, he learned that shock wasn't important to darkness.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The key was the total amount of energy.
Shirone cast Photon Cannon, and eight photons appeared in irregular positions on the left and right.
The eight beams of light struck the Vortex Serpent.
A terrible scream echoed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy unleashed Fireballs.
Fire contained light, so it should be effective.
The Vortex Serpent's shadow caught fire.
But it was like an ant biting an elephant's skin.
The shadow was so enormous it felt like cheating.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Canis couldn't even attempt his magic.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Attacking with darkness only made the Serpent stronger.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The outcome between identical attributes was determined by power.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you couldn't control a darkness greater than the Vortex Serpent, you'd be devoured.
Shirone left his friends.
If the creature's shroud enveloped them again, it would be truly dangerous.
The Vortex Serpent moved in wide circles, true to its name.
When Shirone hit its side with the Photon Cannon, it writhed in pain and pursued him.
As the Vortex Serpent abruptly changed direction, its massive tail swung towards Amy's group.

blocks.speaker: Clove
blocks.content: Aaah! It's coming!
Amy deployed Fire Mist.
The fire's smoke protected everyone, but it wasn't enough to burn the tail.
Just as the tail was about to sweep them away like a broom, Amy cast Fire Wall for extra protection.
The tail caught fire, but its trajectory didn't change.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy bit her lip and increased the power.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She was determined to hold her ground, even if it cost her life.
Just as the tail was about to hit Amy, it suddenly diverted, grazing her face.
The Vortex Serpent couldn't bear the fire's pain and pulled back.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone!
The Vortex Serpent snapped its jaws and engulfed Shirone.
Simultaneously, the Photon Cannon exploded, blowing the Serpent's head apart.
The Photon Cannon fired in rapid succession.
Amy estimated it fired about 200 rounds per minute.
For Shirone, who held the school's speed record, this was possible.
The firing speed increased, and then it became a continuous beam that pushed the shadow to the opposite wall.

blocks.speaker: Clove
blocks.content: What kind of magic is that? It's ridiculous! That can't be possible!

blocks.speaker: Kanya
blocks.content: Kanya and Rena were equally shocked.

blocks.speaker: Clove
blocks.content: While it was good for their side to be winning, Clove couldn't believe what he was seeing.

blocks.speaker: Kanya
blocks.content: Seeing someone single-handedly fight the feared Vortex Serpent was awe-inspiring.
More so, they were winning.
Seeing the Serpent thrashing against the wall sent chills down their spines.
Shirone's beam turned red.
From the Photon Cannon's photon output, it further compressed the energy to a single-wavelength laser.
The Vortex Serpent tried to recover its shadow realm and push back the laser, but it only resulted in chain explosions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Kiiaaaah!
The fierce roar echoed.
The Vortex Serpent was terrified.
In its original world, it was a lower-tier predator.
It had crossed into Heaven through a strange tunnel ten thousand years ago.
Unable to evolve without predators, it had lived comfortably here.
But now, that comfort was breaking.
By a mere human it used to tear apart for fun.
